name: verify
description: /verify <args> — runs `hexa verify "$@"` (cross-project tier rubric, TECS-L-aligned). Forms: <id> (atlas atom recompute), --expr <fn> <n> <v> (numerical), --fence "<claim>" (honest ⚪ speculation-fenced), rubric / list. NL trigger via skill ('verify this', '확인해', '검증해'). Pairs with commons.tape g5.
